problem id: 60902b81
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  00011111 -> 10000000
  01010111 -> 10000001
  01110100 -> 00000000
  10111110 -> 00000010
  01111001 -> 00000000
  10001011 -> 11000000
  01001101 -> 00000000
  10001100 -> 00000010

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 01000000
